question: Provide a breakdown of the number of sub-districts by area type for each state, sorted alphabetically by state name and then by the highest count.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T3.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area, 
    COUNT(dsd.sub_district_id) AS count
FROM 
    dim_sub_district dsd
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON dsd.district_id = dd.district_id
JOIN 
    dim_state ds ON dd.state_id = ds.state_id
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    count DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area, 
    COUNT(dsd.sub_district_id) AS count
FROM 
    dim_sub_district dsd
JOIN 
    dim_district dd ON dsd.district_id = dd.district_id
JOIN 
    dim_state ds ON dd.state_id = ds.state_id
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    ds.state_name, 
    count DESC;

FROM dim_state 
JOIN dim_district ON dim_state.state_id = dim_district.state_id 
JOIN dim_sub_district ON dim_district.district_id = dim_sub_district.district_id 
WHERE dim_sub_district.type_of_area = 'Rural' 
GROUP BY dim_state.state_name 
ORDER BY COUNT(dim_sub_district.sub_district_id) DESC 
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:

question: Provide a monthly breakdown of total allopathic outpatient attendance for the year 2022, ranked from highest to lowest volume.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.MONTH_NAME, SUM(T3.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_YEAR AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID WHERE T1.YEAR_VALUE = '2022' GROUP BY T2.MONTH_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dm.month_name, 
    SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_allopathic_outpatient_attendance
FROM 
    fact_outpatient_services fos
JOIN 
    dim_month dm ON fos.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    dy.year_value = '2022'
GROUP BY 
    dm.month_name
ORDER BY 
    total_allopathic_outpatient_attendance DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dm.month_name, 
    SUM(fos.outpatient_attendance_allopathic) AS total_allopathic_outpatient_attendance
FROM 
    fact_outpatient_services fos
JOIN 
    dim_month dm ON fos.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    dy.year_value = '2022'
GROUP BY 
    dm.month_name
ORDER BY 
    total_allopathic_outpatient_attendance DESC;

gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1, T2.ROTAVIRUS_1 FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021';
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(fcis.ROTAVIRUS_1) AS ROTAVIRUS_DOSE_1,
    SUM(fcis.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) AS VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1
FROM 
    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED fcis
JOIN 
    DIM_MONTH dm ON fcis.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT dsd ON fcis.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = dsd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE 
    dy.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND dsd.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: Which rural sub-districts recorded at least one pregnant woman registering for antenatal care during the year 2021?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dsd.sub_district_name 
FROM dim_sub_district dsd
JOIN fact_maternal_anc_registration fm 
ON dsd.sub_district_id = fm.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm 
ON fm.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy 
ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dsd.type_of_area = 'Rural' AND dy.year_value = '2021' AND fm.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc > 0;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dsd.sub_district_name 
FROM dim_sub_district dsd
JOIN fact_maternal_anc_registration fm 
ON dsd.sub_district_id = fm.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm 
ON fm.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy 
ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dsd.type_of_area = 'Rural' AND dy.year_value = '2021' AND fm.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc > 0;

question: Identify the sub-districts that, in 2021, reported either more than 15 Rotavirus 1 immunizations in rural areas or more than 1 Vitamin A first dose administrations in urban areas, listed alphabetically.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND ( (T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T2.ROTAVIRUS_1 > 15.0000000000000000) OR (T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1 > 1.00000000000000000000) ) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dsub.sub_district_name 
FROM fact_child_immunization_specialized AS fcis 
JOIN dim_sub_district AS dsub ON fcis.sub_district_id = dsub.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month AS dm ON fcis.month_id = dm.month_id 
JOIN dim_year AS dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id 
WHERE (dy.year_value = '2021' AND dsub.type_of_area = 'Rural' AND fcis.rotavirus_1 > 15) 
OR (dy.year_value = '2021' AND dsub.type_of_area = 'Urban' AND fcis.vitamin_a_dose_1 > 1) 
ORDER BY dsub.sub_district_name;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dsub.sub_district_name 
FROM fact_child_immunization_specialized AS fcis 
JOIN dim_sub_district AS dsub ON fcis.sub_district_id = dsub.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month AS dm ON fcis.month_id = dm.month_id 
JOIN dim_year AS dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id 
WHERE (dy.year_value = '2021' AND dsub.type_of_area = 'Rural' AND fcis.rotavirus_1 > 15) 
OR (dy.year_value = '2021' AND dsub.type_of_area = 'Urban' AND fcis.vitamin_a_dose_1 > 1) 
ORDER BY dsub.sub_district_name;

question: Rank the urban sub-districts by the total number of pregnant women who received four or more antenatal care checkups during the year 2021, starting with the highest.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, SUM(fact_maternal_anc_registration.pw_received_4_or_more_anc_checkups) AS total_anc_checkups
FROM fact_maternal_anc_registration
JOIN dim_sub_district ON fact_maternal_anc_registration.sub_district_id = dim_sub_district.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month ON fact_maternal_anc_registration.month_id = dim_month.month_id
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id
WHERE dim_sub_district.type_of_area = 'Urban' AND dim_year.year_value = '2021'
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name
ORDER BY total_anc_checkups DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, SUM(fact_maternal_anc_registration.pw_received_4_or_more_anc_checkups) AS total_anc_checkups
FROM fact_maternal_anc_registration
JOIN dim_sub_district ON fact_maternal_anc_registration.sub_district_id = dim_sub_district.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month ON fact_maternal_anc_registration.month_id = dim_month.month_id
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id
WHERE dim_sub_district.type_of_area = 'Urban' AND dim_year.year_value = '2021'
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name
ORDER BY total_anc_checkups DESC;

question: Provide a breakdown of the total number of children over 10 and 16 years old who received immunizations in 2021, categorized by sub-district and area type.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10 + T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_16_YEARS_TT16_TD16) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dsd.sub_district_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area, 
    SUM(fcia.children_more_than_10_years_tt10_td10) AS total_over_10, 
    SUM(fcia.children_more_than_16_years_tt16_td16) AS total_over_16
FROM 
    fact_child_immunization_adolescent fcia
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON fcia.sub_district_id = dsd.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month dm ON fcia.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY 
    dsd.sub_district_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    dsd.sub_district_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dsd.sub_district_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area, 
    SUM(fcia.children_more_than_10_years_tt10_td10) AS total_over_10, 
    SUM(fcia.children_more_than_16_years_tt16_td16) AS total_over_16
FROM 
    fact_child_immunization_adolescent fcia
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district dsd ON fcia.sub_district_id = dsd.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month dm ON fcia.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY 
    dsd.sub_district_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    dsd.sub_district_name, 
    dsd.type_of_area;
